handoffs.report:
**Artifact:** `status-report.md`

**Active positions reported:** 9 (IONQ, USAR, STIM, UAMY, APLD, INTC, CIFR, CLSK, NU — sorted by P/L % ascending per Position Reporting Order)

**Fill alerts:** 1 — SOUN B1 @ $7.63 (day low = order price exactly; broker verification required before Monday open)

**Actionable items:** 11 items flagged across CRITICAL / HIGH / MEDIUM / LOW priority

**Key flags surfaced:**
- CRITICAL: SOUN B1 potential fill — verify at broker
- HIGH: NU + IONQ earnings 3 days out (2026-02-25) — gate any new entries
- MEDIUM: LUNR B1 (-2.2%), NNE B1 (-2.3%), STIM Reserve (-3.1%) all near trigger — orders live
- MEDIUM: APLD B5 (-4.6%) — fill math shown: new avg $30.08 if triggered
- LOW: Time stop review due for all 4 pre-strategy recovery positions (IONQ, UAMY, USAR, INTC)

**Position Reporting Order:** Followed exactly for all 9 positions (Trades Executed → Current Average → Pending Limit Orders → Wick-Adjusted Buy Levels → Projected Sell Levels → Context Flags)

**Wick-adjusted levels:** CLSK and SMCI have wick_analysis.md caches; all pending orders for CLSK confirmed vs. cache (only the above-current $9.66 Half-tier level omitted from orders — not actionable). All other positions reflect prior wick analysis in placed orders.

Status report complete.
